titleStmt.title: SII 22.290: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 290. (A.R. No. 290 of 1906) NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT, WALAJAPET TALUK, TIRUMĀLPURAM. MAṆIKAṆṬHĒŚVARA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. KULŌTTUṄGA-CHŌḶA I—26th YEAR (A.D. 1095-96)

summary.p: The inscription begins with introduction Pugaḻśūḻnda puṇari etc. It registers an agreement given by the Ūrār of the dēvadāna village Tirumālpēṟu in Vallanāḍu a division of Dāmaṟkōṭṭam to one Nambaṉ Madhurāntakadēvaṉ alias Kulōttuṅgaśōḻa-Viraināṭṭu-Mūvēndavēḷāṉ of Paṭṭikuḍi in Viraikkūṟṟam a division of Madhurāntaka-Vaḷanāḍu on the northern bank of the river, to pay, in consideration of a lumpsum received from him, all the kaḍamai taxes such as nelvari, poṉvari, antarāyam, siṟuśuṅgam, and uppukkāśu and the kuḍimai dues like echchōṟu, kūṟṟunel and veṭṭimuṭṭaiyāḷ due on some pieces of land measuring 1600 kuḻi in all endowed by him to the temple after purchasing the same from several individuals.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pukaḻcūḻn=ta puṇari Akaḻcūḻn=ta puviyil ponnemi Aḷavu n=tannemi naṭappa viḷaṅku ceyamakaḷai I
ḷaṅkopparuvattuc cakkarakoṭṭattu vikkiramattoḻilāl putumaṇam puṇarntu matuvarai Īṭṭam vayirākarattu vār A
yirmunaik kun=taḷavaraicar tantaṉamiriya vāḷuraikaḻittut toḷvalikāṭṭip poṟpa
rinaṭāttik kirttiyai niṟutti vaṭaticai vākaicūṭit tenṟicait temarukamalap pūmaka
ḷ potumaiyum ponniāṭai nannilappāvai tanimaiyun=tavirttu punitattiruma
ṇimakuṭa muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭit tannaṭi Iraṇṭu n=taṭamuṭiākat tonnila ventar cūṭa muṉnai
manuvāṟu perukak kaliāṟu vaṟuppac ceṅkol ticaitoṟuñ cella veṇkuṭai Irunilava
ḷākam Eṅkaṇun=taṉātu tirunilaveṇṇivarat tikaḻa Orutaṉimeruviṟp puli viḷaiāṭa vārkaṭaṟṟi[ vān=tara]
ttup pūpaālar tiṟaiviṭu tan=ta nalañcer kaḷiṟu muṟai muṟai niṟpa vilaṅkiya tennavan karun=talai parun=talai
ttiṭat taniponnakar purattiṭaik kiṭappa vinnāḷ piṟkulappiṟaipol nilampiḻaiyeninuñ colleti
rkoṭiṟṟallatu tan kai villetiroṭā vikkalanoṭak kallatar naṅkili tuṭaṅki maṇulūr naṭuvenat
tuṅkapattirai Aḷavum veṅkaṇum paṭṭa veṅkaḷiṟu viṭṭa tan mānamuṅ kūṟiya viramuṅ kiṭappa Eṟina malai
kaḷu mutukuneḷippa Iḻinta natikaḷuñ cuḻanṟuṭain=toṭi viḻun=ta kaṭalkaḷu n=talaivirittalamarak kuṭaticai tan=tatannāḷa
kkattut tānun=tānaiyum pannāḷiṭṭa palapala mutukum payattetirmāṟiya cayapperun=tiruvum paḻi Uka
ntukoṭutta pukaḻuñ celviyum vāḷāroṇkaṇ maṭan=tayariṭṭamum miḷātu kuṭutta veṅkari niraiyum kaṅkama
ṇṭalamuñ ciṅkaṇamennum paraṇi Iraṇṭum Oruvicaik kaikkoṇṭaruḷi Īṇṭiya pukaḻoṭu pā
ṇṭimaṇṭalamuṅ koḷḷat tiruvuḷattaṭaittu veḷḷavaru parittaraṅkamum poruparikkalaṅkaḷu n=tan=tiravāriyu muṭai
ttāy vantu vaṭakaṭal tenkaṭa laṭarvatupōlat tan peruñcenai yevip pañcavaraivarum poruta
poṟkaḷattañci veruneḻittoṭi Araṇenappukka kāṭaṟattuṭaittu nāṭaṭipaṭuttu maṟṟivar tammai
vanacarartiriyum poccai veñcurameṟṟi koṟṟa vijayastambham ticai peṟa niṟutti muttin calāpa
mum muttamiṭ potiyalum maṟṟavan karipaṭai maiyaccaiyyamum kanniyuṅ kaikkoṇṭaruḷit tennā
ṭṭellai kāṭṭiya kaṭalmalai nāṭṭuḷḷa cāveṟellā n=tanivicumpeṟṟi māveṟiya tan varutanittalaivanaikkuṟu
kalar kulaiyak koṭṭāruṭpaṭat ticaitoṟu nilaikaḷiṭṭaruḷit tiṟai koḷḷa ssimhāsana ntirittaruḷi poṅko puyattala
ṅkaḷumpola viramun=tiyākamum viḷaṅkap pārmicaic civaniṭattumai yenat tinacintāmaṇi puvanamuḻutuṭaiyā ḷiruppa A kai viṟṟiru
n=tena maṅkaiyartilata meḻicai vallapi Eḻulakamuṭaiyāḻu vāḻivalattini tiruppa Ūḻiyum puvanamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum hāsanattu
viṟṟirun=taruḷiya kovirājakesaripanmarāna cakravattikaḷ śrī kulottuṅka coḻatevaṟkiyāṇṭirupattāṟāvatu jayaṅ� maṇṭa
lattu tāmaṟkoṭṭattu vallanāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tirumālpeṟuṭaiyār tevatānam tirumālppeṟṟūrom ce vaṭa
karai maturān=takavaḷanāṭṭu viṟaikkūṟṟattup paṭṭikuṭiyi leṭṭi Uṭaiyar tampaṉ maturān=takanāna kulo coḻa viṟai
nāṭṭu muven=taveḷānukku nāṅkaḷiṟaiiḻiccik kuṭutta nilamāvatu Uṭaiyār tirumālppeṟuṭaiyāṟkkutti kallavu n=ti
runantavānañ ceyyavum maṭameṭukkavuṅ kuṭiyirukkavum Ivvūriṟaikkuṭi tirumālppeṟa nampalakkūtta �ṇṭa ko
llai kuḻi munnūṟṟeṇpatteṭṭum nirnilaṅkuḻi Eḻupattiraṇṭaraiyum Aṭikaḷ tevanum Aṭikaḷ netiyanam ṭa kollai
kuḻi munnūṟṟeṇpatteṭṭum nirnilaṅkuḻi Eḻupattiraṇṭaraiyum toṇṭan ciruṭaiyānpakkal � kollai ku
ḻi Eḻupatteṭṭum nirnilaṅkuḻi muppattāṟekālum Eṟan tevanpakkal koṇṭa nirnilaṅkuḻi muppa
m can=tiracekaran vaṭukanpakkal koṇṭa kollai kuḻi nūṟṟaiympattāṟum campantan keyatti
npakkal koṇṭa kollaikuḻi Eḻupatteṭṭum vaṇṇakkan poṟcayan ponnālanpa
kkal koṇṭa tumpaikkollai kuḻi nūṟṟunālpatekālum Ākakkuḻi Āyi
rattu nānūṟṟu nālppattunālemukkālum Itanuḷ Aḷavupaṭāta Uḷmeṭu
m varampinālum Uttecappaṭi kuḻi nūṟṟaimpattañce kālum tiruvūrakattu ninṟān
Innila maḷavukolāl kuḻi Āyirattaṟunūṟṟukkum tirumālppeṟṟūrom can=tirātitta
varai nelvariyum poṉvariyum An=tarāyamum ciṟucuṅkamum Uppukkācum
Innilattiru n=tāraip peṟkācum Uḷḷiṭṭa kaṭamai Eppeṟpaṭṭanavum
Eccoṟṟuk kūṟṟunel veṭṭimuṭṭaiyāḷ Uḷpaṭṭa koyilvācalāṟ po
nta kuṭimai Ellā mittirumālppeṟṟūrome Iṟukkakkaṭavomaāka nampan maturāntakate
vanāna kulottuṅkacoḻa viṟaināṭṭu muventaveḷān pakkalemmilicainta poruḷaṟak
koṇṭu nāṅkaḷ can=tirātittarvarai Iṟaiiṟukkak kaṭavomāka Iṟai Iḻiccikkuṭuttom tirumāl
ppeṟṟūrom + Ivarkaḷ veṇṭa veḻutinen tirumālppeṟuṭaiyār koyilil śivabrāhmaṇan kau
śikan Iṣabhavāhana paṭṭanen Ivai En neḻuttu Ippaṭikku tirumālppeṟa nampalakkūttanen Ivai Enneḻuttu
Ippaṭikku vaṭukanātan tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyānen Ivai Enneḻuttu Ippaṭikku ponnālan tirumālp peṟuṭaiyā
nen Ivai Enneḻuttu Ippaṭikku can=tiracekaran vaṭukanen Ivai En neḻuttu Ippaṭikkuk kaṭa
li ciruṭaiyānen Ivai Enneḻuttu Ippaṭikku campantan keyapācana muṭaiyānen Ivai En
neḻuttu Ippaṭikkuc cotivaitta māneti Ivai Enneḻuttu Ippaṭikkut tevantai Eṭṭi
tevantaiyen Ivai Enneḻuttu . ..
Digital edition of SII 22.290 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
